transcript: The milk in there and set it off to the next morning you'd go out there and about an inch down would be all real thick cream And a very young age I Learned to drink a little coffee that was kind of a Special treat she would look mom would let me have a cup of coffee and And go out and put a spoon full of that big rich cream in it and a little spoon full of sugar and then Dump my biscuits in it Go basal's house and To see how he's doing and boy is he doing great. I'm telling you you'd never know he'd been through a triple bypass operation We enjoyed so much talking to them
